message:
fix: remove duplicate help groups GroupMaintenance/GroupIntegrations (bd-54jr)

Remove the unused GroupMaintenance="maintenance" and GroupIntegrations="integrations"
constants and their AddGroup calls, which duplicated the 'maint' and 'advanced' groups
already registered later in init(). Change rename_prefix.go to use the canonical
'maint' group ID directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/ruby
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -31,12 +31,6 @@ import (
 	oteltrace "go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace"
 )
 
-// Command group IDs for help organization
-const (
-	GroupMaintenance  = "maintenance"
-	GroupIntegrations = "integrations"
-)
-
 var (
 	dbPath     string
 	actor      string
@@ -185,12 +179,6 @@ func init() {
 		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to initialize config: %v\n", err)
 	}
 
-	// Add command groups for organized help output
-	rootCmd.AddGroup(
-		&cobra.Group{ID: GroupMaintenance, Title: "Maintenance:"},
-		&cobra.Group{ID: GroupIntegrations, Title: "Integrations & Advanced:"},
-	)
-
 	// Register persistent flags
 	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().StringVar(&dbPath, "db", "", "Database path (default: auto-discover .beads/*.db)")
 	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().StringVar(&actor, "actor", "", "Actor name for audit trail (default: $BD_ACTOR, git user.name, $USER)")

@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ import (
 
 var renamePrefixCmd = &cobra.Command{
 	Use:     "rename-prefix <new-prefix>",
-	GroupID: GroupMaintenance,
+	GroupID: "maint",
 	Short:   "Rename the issue prefix for all issues in the database",
 	Long: `Rename the issue prefix for all issues in the database.
 This will update all issue IDs and all text references across all fields.
